outcomes: README status language now states the verified product surface and explicitly names the current unsupported or incomplete areas.
Cross-platform and architecture docs now frame platform-native enforcement as target direction where it is not yet runtime-complete.
The daemon worker no longer logs itself as a placeholder service.
The placeholder integration test was replaced with real coverage for CLI network blocking and hosted runspace execution behavior.
Integration test runtime dependency closure for hosted PowerShell was fixed by carrying the PowerShell SDK into the integration test host.
remainingWithinBatch: Further end-to-end daemon-plus-shim coverage is still desirable beyond the current integration additions.
docs/cli-reference.md was not revised in this batch and may still need tightening during the usability-focused batch.

selectedBatch.goal: Align README/docs and integration coverage with what the product actually does today, while removing the most misleading placeholders.
selectedBatch.name: Batch 1 - Honest product surface and integration hardening
